description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist rectangular design and a dark gray exterior. The front features a covered entryway with steps, flanked by two large planters and a wide driveway leading to a spacious garage. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and lush landscaping, partially enclosed by a low wall. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a layered architectural effect. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a front entryway with planters, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, planters, and the attached garage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the large windows, backyard landscaping, and the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and sliding glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the flat roof, upper story setback, and the enclosed backyard with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, wide double doors, flanked by large planters and a paved approach
